content.query:
--CETAS ( not defining columns and all as we directly storing another query results)
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE cetas_table
with (
    LOCATION = 'cetas_external_table',
    DATA_SOURCE = external_source,
    FILE_FORMAT = formatcsv
)
as 
SELECT *
FROM OPENROWSET(
        BULK '/samples_External_files/dim_product.csv',
		DATA_SOURCE = 'external_source',
        FORMAT='CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION='2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
) AS data;

--- VIEWS 
create VIEW view_query
as 
SELECT * from 
OPENROWSET (
        BULK 'samples_External_files/dim_date.csv',
		DATA_SOURCE = 'external_source',
        FORMAT='CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION='2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
) as query1
